visual: Wide bow stance with arms extended laterally, rear hand forming a hooked 'beak' and front hand pushing outward with palm facing away.
motion_description: The right arm extends horizontally with the hand forming a hook. The left leg steps laterally into a wide stance, shifting weight to the left. The torso rotates left as the left arm pushes outward, palm facing away. The slow, continuous motion concludes with arms extended laterally.
